contexts.context: MK: I’m <mark>anticipating</mark> that we’ll have <xsl:record> in…
…iterate and know the position. It’s hard to <mark>anticipate</mark> if there’s a use case for this particular function…
…which was published before XSD 1.1, but which <mark>anticipated</mark> some of the changes in XSD 1.1, for…
… I’ve <mark>anticipated</mark> putting them in the fn: namespace and adding…
…we add a note that specifically says that we <mark>anticipate</mark> that other separators will be stripped out.
Regrets from SF, ED, DN. <mark>Anticipated</mark> regrets from MSM and JK.
